'''鈭歱-dh-z-dh''' ('''kapadhzedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longboard|longboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longboard|longboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-dh-z-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kapadhzedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipadhzedhoko|thipadhzedhoko]] || [[word:jipadhzedhoko|jipadhzedhoko]] || [[word:shipadhzedhoko|shipadhzedhoko]] || [[word:kipadhzedhoko|kipadhzedhoko]]
